meta.question: What are the top-level work packges in the TMT Projet?
meta.finalAnswer:
Top-level work packages in the TMT Project (i.e., packages not owned by another element) include:

- Work Packages
- WorkPackages
- Project Systems Engineering
- TMT Observatory System
- TMT
- TMT-APS-SE
- TMT-APS DDD
- TMT-APS Use Cases
- IMCE profile adaption for TMT
- TMT-APS L3 Requirements
- TMT-APS Requirements Flow-down
- TMT-APS Model Information
- TMT ICD: APS to M1CS
- TMT-APS Analysis
- TMT-APS JIRA Issues
- WorkPackages/Optics/WorkPackages
- Actuator Package
- C2000 Package

(There are 23 top-level package entries in total; only the first batch of names was shown in the query output.)
